writing.title: Writing Task 1: Will vs going to
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) about your future, using both will (uncertain prediction) and going to (clear plan).
writing.sampleAnswer: I am going to study abroad after graduation. I already applied to a university. I'm sure something good will happen. Maybe I will travel for a year first.
checklist: Có ít nhất 1 câu dùng going to cho kế hoạch rõ ràng
Có ít nhất 1 câu dùng will cho dự đoán không chắc chắn
Phân biệt được rõ hai trường hợp dùng

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Compare two things
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) comparing two things (rooms, bags, places...), using comparative adjectives.
writing.sampleAnswer: This apartment is bigger than the other one, but it is also noisier. The other apartment is quieter, but the rooms are smaller. This one is more expensive.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 2 tính từ so sánh hơn (-er hoặc more)
Có dùng than đúng vị trí
So sánh được ít nhất 3 đặc điểm khác nhau
